rule: split by chromosome (never by variant); whole chromosomes assigned to test
forced_test_reason: chr2 holds the BIN1/rs6733839 grounding locus and the validated directional failure
test_selection: chr2 forced, then add on-wedge-densest chromosomes until >=22% of variants are in test
direction_convention: direction = sign(activity_alt - activity_ref) in the variant's cell context
leakage_guard: no variant appears in both folds; whole chromosomes are held out so no cis-locus spans the split
dedup_note: harmonized table deduplicated to unique (variant_id,context): duplicate AD-MPRA enhancer constructs for the same variant×context aggregated by mean effect_size (6 variant×context pairs, 2157->2151 rows)
